data.body: 4214 PS8: AC-coverage subagent (a640ef01) surfaced a REAL security gap (finding #4 commit-half unmet): the gate read merged_log_commit from the attacker-writable plaintext record mirror, not the signed envelope. FIXED opcert.opcert_from_record to source {material_fingerprint, merged_log_commit} from the verified DSSE payload predicate (verify-then-extract). Removed the xfail(strict) marker; plaintext-mirror-invariance test now GREEN (teeth: old code xfailed it, fix passes). Added 5 AC-coverage tests (off-history commit fails closed, plaintext invariance, rollback: revoke-after-anchor grandfathers/kill-switch/unresolvable-anchor, trusted-env add|revoke tip-stamp). Opcert+trusted-env suite: 45 passed. Running lint/typecheck + full suite before amending #664 PS8.
